body.title: CLOSED: SensorDevice — system telemetry collection in ADC
body.result: SensorDevice in devices/sensor/: CPU/mem/disk/temps/fans/camera-mic stubs via psutil; SensorShim; 703 tests pass; pushed e9bfc53
body.description:
Extract system sensor collection out of Igor into a SensorDevice in ADC. Igor currently does some of this inline via ResourceMonitorSource in push_sources.py (CPU, mem, disk). The device consolidates: CPU%, memory, temps, fan speeds, SMART disk health, and stubs for camera/mic discovery. Igor (and other agents) subscribe via MCP instead of polling internally.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/sensor/ (new), agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/ (new SensorShim), TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (ResourceMonitorSource — remove or thin once device is live)
**Design rules:** BaseDevice/BaseShim contract; no direct psutil calls in Igor after migration; MCP tool surface only
**Scope boundary:** IN — CPU, mem, disk (SMART + usage), temps, fans, camera/mic discovery stub. OUT — acting on sensor data (that stays in Igor's habits), network topology sensors, anything requiring root.
**Test plan:** Unit tests for each sensor reader; integration test confirming MCP tool returns valid JSON; Igor's ResourceMonitorSource still passes its existing tests until removal ticket filed separately.
